description: UI overhaul for Derby Digital Onboarding Portal. Redesign to match reference UI: clean step tracker sidebar, Derby Digital brand colors, bolder typography, light/dark mode toggle, and iframe-embeddable for WordPress. Reference: vertical step tracker with icons on left, form content on right, gradient blue CTAs, clean white cards on light mode with dark blue option.

userStories.title: Redesign wizard layout with vertical step tracker sidebar
userStories.description: Replace the current horizontal progress bar with a vertical step tracker on the left side (like the reference image). Each step shows: step number label (STEP 1, STEP 2, etc), an icon in a blue circle, and the step title. Active step is highlighted with filled blue circle. Completed steps show a checkmark. Upcoming steps are dimmed. The step tracker should be in a card/panel on the left (about 30% width on desktop). The form content fills the right side (70%). On mobile, the step tracker collapses to a horizontal mini bar at the top. Bottom of the left panel shows a blue gradient CTA button: 'Next: [Step Name] →'. At the top right corner show 'Call us for help' with phone number (502) 702-6268.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Vertical step tracker renders on left with icons. Active/completed/upcoming states work. Mobile collapses gracefully. Next button shows upcoming step name. Build passes.

userStories.title: Update color scheme to Derby Digital brand
userStories.description: Update all colors to match Derby Digital brand. Primary gradient: #2093FF to #0026FF. Backgrounds: offer both a dark mode (deep navy #0A1628 not pure black) and a light mode (soft gray-blue gradient like #F0F4F8 to #E8EEF4, similar to reference image right panel). Cards: white with subtle shadow on light mode, #1A2744 on dark mode. Text: #1A1A2E on light, white on dark. Accent/CTA buttons: blue gradient #2093FF → #0026FF with white text. Step tracker icons: blue #2093FF circles. Default to light mode since it will embed on derbydigital.us which is light. Remove any purple or overly dark black backgrounds.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Colors match Derby Digital brand. Light mode is default. No purple anywhere. Gradient buttons work. Contrast is readable. Build passes.

userStories.title: Bold typography and spacing overhaul
userStories.description: Import and use Anton font for main headings and step titles. Use Inter or DM Sans for body text and form labels. Increase heading sizes: welcome headline should be 48px+ on desktop. Step titles in the tracker should be 18px bold. Form labels 14px semibold. Increase spacing between form fields (gap-6 minimum). Add more padding inside cards (p-8 on desktop). Input fields should be larger (h-12 minimum) with rounded-lg borders. Everything should feel spacious and premium, not cramped.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Anton font loads for headings. Inter/DM Sans for body. Sizes increased. Spacing feels premium. Inputs are large and comfortable. Build passes.

userStories.title: Redesign welcome/landing step
userStories.description: Make the welcome step bold and exciting. Large gradient text headline: 'Let's Get You More Leads'. Subtext: 'Fill out this quick form and our team will set up your Google ads within 48 hours. Takes about 5 minutes.' Derby Digital logo prominently displayed. Add a subtle animated mesh gradient or soft blue glow in the background (CSS only, no heavy libraries). Show a mini preview of the steps they'll complete (like the reference image step list). Big blue gradient button: 'Get Started →'. Add social proof line: 'Trusted by 50+ local businesses'. The entire welcome should feel like joining an exclusive program.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Welcome looks bold and premium. Gradient text works. Step preview shows. Animation is subtle. Button is prominent. Build passes.

userStories.title: Redesign form inputs and service selection cards
userStories.description: All form inputs: white background, 1px #D1D9E6 border, rounded-xl, h-12 height, text-base size, blue border on focus (#2093FF), subtle shadow on focus. Labels above inputs in semibold. Required asterisk in red. Validation errors in red-500 below the input with a small icon. Service selection cards: rounded-xl with border, hover state adds blue border + subtle blue background tint. Selected state: blue border + blue-50 background + checkmark icon in top right. Cards in a 2-col grid on mobile, 3-col on desktop. Each card has a relevant icon (wrench for plumber, bolt for electrician, etc) centered above the label.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Inputs look polished and consistent. Service cards have proper hover/selected states with icons. Grid responsive. Build passes.

userStories.title: Redesign document upload zones and ad preference cards
userStories.description: Document upload zones: dashed border (#D1D9E6), rounded-xl, large drop area with cloud upload icon centered, text: 'Drag & drop or click to upload'. On hover: border goes blue, background gets subtle blue tint. After upload: show file name, size, green checkmark, and a remove button. Ad budget selection: large radio cards (not small radios). Each card shows the budget range in bold with a brief note underneath. Selected card gets blue border + blue-50 background. Platform checkboxes: styled as pill/tag toggles that highlight blue when selected.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Upload zones look clean with proper states. Budget cards are large and clear. Platform pills toggle properly. Build passes.

userStories.title: Redesign review, confirmation, and admin pages
userStories.description: Review step: organized in card sections with headers (Business Info, Services, Documents, Ad Preferences). Each section has a subtle blue-gray header bar and an 'Edit' link on the right. Data in clean key-value pairs. Submit button is extra large blue gradient with 'Submit Your Info →'. Confirmation page: large checkmark animation (CSS), gradient headline 'You're All Set!', numbered next steps in a vertical timeline similar to the step tracker. Admin dashboard: match the same clean light theme. Cards with subtle shadows, blue accent stats, clean table with alternating row shading.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Review sections are organized with headers and edit links. Confirmation has checkmark animation. Admin matches the light theme. Build passes.

userStories.title: Make embeddable via iframe for WordPress
userStories.description: Create an /embed route that renders the full onboarding wizard without the outer chrome (no header, no footer, just the wizard). Add proper iframe communication: postMessage to parent on step change and on completion. Add a public/embed.js script that WordPress can include: it creates an iframe pointing to the /embed route, handles auto-height resize via postMessage, and provides a simple API: DerbyOnboarding.init({container: '#onboarding', baseUrl: 'https://onboarding.derbydigital.us'}). The embed should work at any width (min 320px). Add X-Frame-Options and CSP headers that allow embedding from derbydigital.us. Document the embed code in README.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Embed route renders wizard without chrome. embed.js creates functional iframe. Auto-height works. Can embed on any WordPress page. README has embed instructions. Build passes.

userStories.title: Animations and micro-interactions polish
userStories.description: Add smooth transitions between steps (slide left/right based on direction, 300ms). Step tracker: active step pulses subtly. Completed step icon animates in (scale from 0 to 1). Form inputs: subtle fade-in stagger when step loads (each field appears 50ms after the previous). Buttons: subtle scale on hover (1.02), press effect on click (0.98). Cards: lift shadow on hover. Progress percentage: smooth count-up animation. Confetti on submit (lightweight CSS confetti, no heavy library). Loading states: skeleton shimmer effect on async operations. All animations should be CSS/Tailwind, no heavy animation libraries.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Step transitions are smooth. Micro-interactions feel polished. Confetti plays on submit. No jank or layout shift. Performance stays fast. Build passes.

userStories.title: Final responsive polish and build verification
userStories.description: Test and fix all pages at 375px (mobile), 768px (tablet), 1024px (laptop), 1440px (desktop). Step tracker: vertical on desktop, horizontal mini-bar on mobile. Forms: single column on mobile, proper spacing. Service cards: 2-col mobile, 3-col desktop. Upload zones: full width on mobile. Admin table: horizontal scroll on mobile. Ensure all text is readable, no overflow, no cut-off content. Verify the full flow works: welcome → all steps → upload → review → submit → admin shows submission. Run npm run build and ensure zero errors and zero warnings.
userStories.acceptCriteria: Fully responsive at all breakpoints. Full flow works end to end. Build passes with zero errors. No visual bugs.
